Questions and answers

Where can I open a VISA Infinite card?

You can open a card at any branch of our bank. Free delivery is also available - we will bring the card to your location.

Will I have a personal manager?

Yes, you will have: VIP Manager of the Bank and Concierge service from VISA How to use: https://cis.visa.com/visa-in-kyrgyzstan/promotions/concierge.html#2. Quick dial to the CC: 3333

What is DragonPass?

DragonPass is an international program that opens the doors to airport lounges around the world.

Will there be CashBack on the VISA Infinite card?

Yes, when paying with a card at POS (payment at retail outlets) and E-Com (an online transaction when paying for goods or services via the Internet using a bank card) CashBack 3% ON EVERYTHING* 7% (on MCC code 5094 - Jewelry) Maximum accrual amount per month 2,000 soms Minimum amount to be paid from 100 soms *Funds are credited at the beginning of the reporting period of the following month.
